title: antidesma montanum var. wallichii
intro: Antidesma montanum var. wallichii, also known as the Himalayan Cudrun or Wild Cudra, is a variety of the Antidesma montanum plant species, which belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Antidesma montanum var. wallichii include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction for medicinal use, with some traditional preparations also involving the use of its leaves or roots in combination with other herbs.
